statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: The input will contain a single integer `n` representing the array size, followed by `n` integers `a_0, a_1, ..., a_{n-1}` representing the array elements.
statement.outputFormat: The output should be a single integer representing the number of pairs of coins that add up to the same value.
statement.notes: The array may contain duplicate elements. Time and space complexity should be O(n).

examples.explanation: The pair with value 15 is the only pair that has the same value.
